title: supersedes relation (ONT-R-07)
description: USE FOR: RegulationClause(new) supersedes RegulationClause(old); Standard(rev_C) supersedes Standard(rev_B); ExpertNote supersedes ExpertNote. Pitfall #6 lock: when status=superseded on the OLD clause, this relation provides the FORWARD pointer to the new one. Phase 3 validator can cross-check that supersedes points to an entity whose previous version's status is indeed 'superseded' — i.e. the active→superseded RegulationClause status flow is bound to the supersedes edge so that abandoned regulation versions remain traceable. Schema version: 0.1.0.

supersession_reason.description: Optional. ≥20 chars rationale for why the new artifact supersedes the old (e.g. 'Updated airworthiness requirement per FAA NPRM 2024-0117').
